alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices scaling global commercial operations; partnership and stakeholder management across product, sales, and customer success teams
alignments.job_requirement: Partner with customers to uncover core business challenges and determine how Celonis Process Intelligence can help achieve business objectives

alignments.candidate_evidence: Led transformation programs involving UAT, rollout, and change management; experience presenting to leadership and influencing decision-makers
alignments.job_requirement: Execute proof projects and deliver presentations to senior executives to drive investment decisions

alignments.candidate_evidence: Transformation program leadership and requirements/logic design with focus on business impact and adoption; trusted advisor positioning at Google
alignments.job_requirement: Drive change management and value realisation, build trust through technical and business acumen as trusted advisor

alignments.candidate_evidence: Python basic and actively learning; no production AI/ML engineering background or hands-on experience building AI solutions
alignments.job_requirement: Prototype and develop AI solutions tailored to customer needs, including machine learning and LLM-based solutions

gaps.gap: Orbit is a 12-month graduate/early-career program explicitly for launching careers in enterprise SaaS; candidate has ~8 years experience and is over-leveled for junior onboarding and mentorship-heavy curriculum
gaps.mitigation: Candidate could transition into a mid-market or enterprise VE role at Celonis outside the Orbit program if technical AI/ML depth is developed and process mining expertise is built

gaps.gap: Limited hands-on experience with SQL, Python, or process mining; role requires basic-to-applied knowledge of these technologies for proof-of-concept development
gaps.mitigation: Self-directed learning in Python and SQL feasible over weeks; process mining (Celonis Rising Star modules) can be learned on-the-job, but starting knowledge is minimal

gaps.gap: No demonstrated AI/ML engineering or solution prototyping background; role explicitly requires prototyping AI solutions, including machine learning and LLM-based solutions
gaps.mitigation: Technical product operations and requirements expertise could support ideation; however, hands-on prototyping and development execution would require close mentorship and likely extended timeline

gaps.gap: Visa/relocation constraint: role requires Japanese citizenship or visa holder, fluent in Japanese, willing to stay in Madrid 12 months then relocate to Tokyo; candidate languages are English (fluent) and German (native), no mention of Japanese
gaps.mitigation: No mitigation; this is a disqualifying legal and operational requirement for the role

hard_blockers.evidence: "Looking for Japanese citizens / visa holders, fluent in Japanese, willing to stay in Madrid for 12 months before having the view to relocate to Tokyo." Candidate profile lists English (professional/fluent) and German (native) only; no Japanese language capability or Japan visa eligibility indicated.

output.summary: This is an entry-to-mid-level Value Engineer program role at Celonis requiring Japanese citizenship/visa, Japanese fluency, and hands-on AI/ML prototyping skills. Candidate brings strong strategic operations and transformation leadership from Google (8 years, multiple promotions, L4-equivalent scope) but is significantly over-leveled for a 12-month graduate program, lacks Japanese language and visa eligibility, has minimal SQL/Python/process-mining depth, and no AI solution prototyping experience. Role family overlap exists in customer problem-solving and stakeholder management, but the hard visa/language requirement and steep technical learning curve make this a poor fit. Skip for advisory band; hard blocker on visa/language requirement.
uncertainties: Candidate's current visa status and ability or willingness to obtain Japan work visa not disclosed
Depth of business problem-solving vs. hands-on technical execution required from Value Engineer in practice at Celonis unclear from JD
Whether Celonis would consider over-leveled candidates for Orbit program or only entry-level/recent-graduate cohorts
Candidate's appetite for returning to junior/structured learning role after 8 years of senior scope not stated
